---
name: Bug report
about: Something is broken or behaves unexpectedly
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## To reproduce

Steps to reproduce the behavior:

1. Import '...'
2. Add helper '...'
3. Run operation '...'
4. See error

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Screenshots / logs

If applicable, add screenshots and paste the **status console** output and any backend
terminal logs.

## Environment

- OS: [e.g. Windows 11]
- Browser: [e.g. Chrome 124]
- Blender installed & version: [e.g. 4.2, or "not installed"]
- Geometry engine used: [Blender | trimesh/manifold3d | unknown]
- LocalMeshAI commit / version:

## Mesh details (if geometry-related)

- File format: [STL/OBJ/PLY/3MF]
- Watertight? [yes/no/unknown]
- Triangle count:
- Attach a minimal mesh that reproduces it if possible.
